 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.9","title":"Mouse/Shortcuts Pass: Core screens","description":"Purpose
- Track mouse-first + shortcut-rich upgrades for Core-category screens.

Included Screens
- Widget Gallery
- Layout Lab
- Advanced Features
- Responsive Demo
- Intrinsic Sizing
- Layout Inspector
- Widget Builder

Core Interaction Themes
- Clickable controls and panels behave like real UI (hover, click, wheel scroll where appropriate).
- Keyboard shortcuts allow rapid toggling of modes, overlays, and parameters.
- Inspector/hit-region debugging remains available and deterministic.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:47:54.640489740Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T01:47:54.640489740Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["core","demo-showcase","mouse","shortcuts"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:47:54.640489740Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.1","title":"Widget Gallery: click-to-focus + mouse scrolling + shortcut power","description":"Background
- Widget Gallery is the canonical catalog of widgets. It should feel like a real interactive component library.

Goal
- Make the gallery strongly mouse-friendly and give it shortcuts that let users rapidly explore widget behavior.

Mouse Interactions
- Hover highlights the widget card/region under pointer.
- Click selects/focuses a widget region and shows an interaction hint (what wheel/keys do).
- Wheel scrolls within the active widget region (list/table/tree) when applicable.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `J/K` or `↑/↓`: next/prev widget section.
- `Enter`: activate focused widget (e.g., toggle a switch / open a modal sample).
- `T`: cycle widget themes/presets.
- `F`: toggle a compact filter/search input for widget list.
- `R`: reset demo state deterministically.

Acceptance Criteria
- Mouse-only exploration is viable: a user can click around and see state changes.
- At least 5 meaningful shortcuts are available and listed in help overlay.
- Snapshot tests cover at least one focused/hovered state.

Key References
- `crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/widget_gallery.rs`","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SilentFinch","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:47.464152779Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T18:36:40.231606994Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T18:36:39.953210242Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","mouse","shortcuts","widget-gallery"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.1","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:47.464152779Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.1","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:47.464152779Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.1","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:47.464152779Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.1","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:47.464152779Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":875,"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"SilentFinch verified: mouse handling, keybindings, hit-testing implemented. 160+ lib tests pass. Closing.","created_at":"2026-02-06T18:36:40Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.2","title":"Layout Lab: mouse-driven constraint manipulation + rich shortcuts","description":"Background
- Layout Lab is the 'constraints in motion' demo.

Goal
- Make layout experiments directly manipulable with the mouse (drag handles, click to select constraints) and provide shortcuts for fast exploration.

Mouse Interactions
- Click a panel/box to select it.
- Drag handles to adjust size constraints or weights (deterministic steps).
- Wheel over selected element adjusts a primary parameter (spacing/weight) with a visible readout.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `H`: toggle layout overlays (bounds, constraints, guides).
- `Space`: play/pause any layout animation.
- `[`/`]`: decrease/increase spacing.
- `R`: reset scenario.

Acceptance Criteria
- Mouse drag changes layout deterministically and is reversible/resettable.
- Help overlay documents mouse and keyboard interactions.

Key References
- `crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/layout_lab.rs`
- `crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/layout_inspector.rs`","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:47.752236233Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T18:59:37.166729656Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T18:59:37.166711111Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","layout","mouse","shortcuts"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.2","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:47.752236233Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.2","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:47.752236233Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.2","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:47.752236233Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.2","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:47.752236233Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.3","title":"Advanced Features: make every panel clickable + shortcut-driven","description":"Background
- Advanced Features is a grab-bag of composite patterns (timers, spinners, diagnostics).

Goal
- Turn passive examples into interactive ones: click to toggle, click to drill in, shortcuts to trigger scenarios.

Mouse Interactions
- Click toggles for each feature module.
- Wheel scrolls within any log/diagnostic pane.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `S`: start/stop spinner demo.
- `D`: toggle diagnostics verbosity.
- `R`: reset.

Acceptance Criteria
- At least one mouse interaction per sub-panel.
- At least 3-5 meaningful shortcuts.

 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.4","title":"Responsive Demo: clickable breakpoints + mouse-driven layout preview","description":"Background
- Responsive Demo showcases breakpoint-driven layout changes.

Goal
- Make breakpoint switching and inspection obvious and interactive with mouse + shortcuts.

Mouse Interactions
- Click breakpoint pills to switch.
- Hover shows breakpoint metadata (name, min/max) in status hint.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `1-5`: jump to specific breakpoint.
- `←/→`: prev/next breakpoint.
- `R`: reset.

Acceptance Criteria
- Mouse clicks change breakpoint deterministically.
- Help overlay lists shortcuts.

Key References
- `crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/responsive_demo.rs`","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SilentFinch","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:48.352874903Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T18:41:09.375926313Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T18:41:09.074081455Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","mouse","responsive","shortcuts"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.4","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:48.352874903Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.4","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:48.352874903Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.4","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:48.352874903Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.4","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:48.352874903Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":876,"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"SilentFinch: Implemented mouse click on indicator, wheel scroll, number keys 1-5 for breakpoint jumping, Shift+arrow for breakpoint stepping, arrow keys for width adjustment, reset. 8 keybindings in help overlay. 22 tests pass (7 new).","created_at":"2026-02-06T18:41:09Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.5","title":"Intrinsic Sizing: mouse toggles + interactive content controls","description":"Background
- Intrinsic sizing examples are easiest to understand when users can toggle content/wrap and immediately see layout change.

Goal
- Add mouse and shortcut controls to mutate content and sizing rules live.

Mouse Interactions
- Click toggles for wrap mode, content samples, and sizing policy.
- Wheel over a numeric control adjusts it (with visible step size).

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `W`: cycle wrap modes.
- `C`: cycle content samples.
- `+/-`: adjust size parameter.
- `R`: reset.

Acceptance Criteria
- Users can reproduce multiple layout outcomes quickly via mouse/keys.

Key References
- `crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/intrinsic_sizing.rs`","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SwiftPrairie","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:48.646063439Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T18:54:32.111952555Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T18:54:32.111933269Z","close_reason":"Completed: width override system (w/+/-/r), number keys 1-4, mouse scroll/click, 6 new tests, all 20 tests pass","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","intrinsic","mouse","shortcuts"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.5","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:48.646063439Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.5","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:48.646063439Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.5","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:48.646063439Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.5","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:48:48.646063439Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.6","title":"Layout Inspector: click-to-select nodes + wheel scroll + shortcuts","description":"Background
- Layout Inspector is a key 'explainability' screen: users should be able to click things and see why layout happened.

Goal
- Make the inspector mouse-first: click nodes/regions to select, scroll lists, and highlight corresponding areas.

Mouse Interactions
- Click in the tree to select node.
- Hover highlights node bounds in the preview.
- Wheel scrolls the tree and/or details pane.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `/`: focus search/filter.
- `Enter`: expand/collapse node.
- `H`: toggle highlight modes.

Acceptance Criteria
- Selection is consistent between mouse and keyboard.
- Snapshot covers selected node state.

Key References

-{"id":"bd-iuvb.17.9.7","title":"Widget Builder: fully mouse-editable controls + shortcut macros","description":"Background
- Widget Builder is a sandbox. It should feel like a small IDE panel.

Goal
- Make the builder operable via mouse: click to focus fields, drag sliders, click toggles, with shortcuts for rapid iteration.

Mouse Interactions
- Click property rows to focus.
- Drag sliders/knobs (deterministic step).
- Click preview area to toggle an example interaction.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `Ctrl+S`: save preset (session-local) / export.
- `Ctrl+R`: reset preset.
- `Tab`/`Shift+Tab`: focus next/prev field.

Acceptance Criteria
- A user can build a widget configuration with mouse alone (except text entry).
- Help overlay lists builder shortcuts.

Key References

 {"id":"bd-iuvb.2","title":"Demo: Determinism Lab (Checksum Equivalence)","description":"Background
- Correctness and determinism are core differentiators, but currently implicit.
- A dedicated lab can make the proof visible and visceral.

Goals
- Render identical scenes through multiple diff strategies and show checksum equivalence.
- Display per-frame change counts and mismatch warnings.
- Allow toggling strategy (Full, DirtyRows, Redraw) and seed.

Menu/IA Fit
- Category: Systems.
- Short label: "Determinism".
- Indexed in Screen Registry with palette tags: "checksum", "diff", "proof".

Implementation Notes
- Use TerminalModel checksum or render-trace checksum logic for validation.
- Visualize mismatch as red banner with first differing coordinate and delta count.
- Include a mini timeline of checksum history for the last N frames.
- Deterministic with fixed seed and frozen time.

Acceptance Criteria
- Checksums match across strategies for identical inputs.
- Mismatch path shows first differing coordinate and delta count.
- User can export a verification report to JSONL.
- UI remains responsive under rapid toggling.
- Screen registered in Screen Registry (category, label, tags, blurb).

Tests / Validation
- Unit tests for checksum equivalence across strategies and seeds.
- Snapshot tests for match and mismatch UI states.
- E2E PTY run (extend `scripts/e2e_demo_showcase.sh`):
  - run_id, strategy, seed, size, checksum, mismatch_coord, outcome","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:50:08.514276659Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T06:25:45.318967806Z","closed_at":"2026-02-04T06:25:45.318949251Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.2","depends_on_id":"bd-3e1t.4.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:52.062308884Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.2","depends_on_id":"bd-3e1t.4.14","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:55.594243894Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.2","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:50:08.514276659Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.3","title":"Demo: Inline Mode Story (Scrollback + Chrome)","description":"Background
- Inline mode is a headline feature but not demonstrated in the showcase.
- Users need to see scrollback preserved with UI chrome stable.

Goals
- Create a screen that simulates a real CLI tool with streaming logs.
- Render a stable UI bar at top/bottom while logs scroll naturally.
- Show explicit "scrollback preserved" callout and mode indicator.

Menu/IA Fit
- Category: Core.
- Short label: "Inline".
- Screen Registry tags: "inline", "scrollback", "chrome".

Implementation Notes
- Use inline mode configuration and a deterministic log stream generator.
- Provide toggles for UI height, anchor (top/bottom), and log rate.
- Include an inline/alt-screen comparison toggle to show differences.
- Add a "scrollback test" action to append long logs quickly.

Acceptance Criteria
- Logs scroll without corrupting the UI region.
- Mode indicator reflects inline vs alt-screen status.
- UI height changes do not flicker or smear.
- Inline/alt comparison is obvious within 10 seconds of use.
- Screen registered in Screen Registry (category, label, tags, blurb).

Tests / Validation
- Snapshot tests at 80x24 and 120x40 with different UI heights/anchors.
- Unit tests for log generator determinism and viewport bounds.
- E2E PTY test in inline mode (extend `scripts/e2e_demo_showcase.sh`) with JSONL logs:
  - run_id, ui_height, anchor, seed, size, log_rate, outcome","notes":"Completed: Inline Mode Story screen + wiring; snapshots generated (inline_mode_story_*). Tests: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings. Full BLESS run was interrupted due to long proptest run; targeted BLESS for inline_mode_story_* succeeded.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:50:17.778674505Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T04:35:13.712625033Z","closed_at":"2026-02-04T04:35:13.712606999Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.3","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:50:17.778674505Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.4","title":"Demo: Explainability Cockpit (Evidence Ledger Overlay)","description":"Background
- Evidence ledgers exist but are not visualized in a unified way.
- A cockpit view makes the "galaxy-brain" decisions feel real.

Goals
- Display diff strategy, BOCPD resize regime, and budget decisions in one panel.
- Show a short "why" line and key posterior values.
- Provide a compact timeline of recent decisions.

Menu/IA Fit
- Category: Systems.
- Short label: "Explain".
- Registry tags: "evidence", "bayes", "bocpd", "budget".

Implementation Notes
- Consume evidence ledgers from runtime/render and map to UI rows.
- Add a compact overlay mode to view alongside any screen.
- Deterministic when evidence sources are deterministic.

Acceptance Criteria
- Cockpit displays all three policy streams (diff, resize, budget).
- Each entry includes timestamp/frame, decision, and evidence summary.
- Overlay can be toggled without impacting underlying screen state.
- Empty-state UI is informative and non-noisy.
- Screen registered in Screen Registry (category, label, tags, blurb).

Tests / Validation
- Unit tests for ledger-to-UI mapping and empty-state behavior.
- Snapshot tests for empty and populated states.
- E2E PTY run (extend `scripts/e2e_demo_showcase.sh`) with JSONL logs:
  - run_id, decision_type, frame_idx, evidence_summary_hash, outcome","notes":"Picked up finish work: added explainability cockpit E2E step + summary JSONL, added snapshot tests + new snapshots, fixed snapshot_player_title expectation, ran BLESS screen_snapshots + cargo fmt/check/clippy.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CopperBeacon","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:50:24.838825596Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T02:54:45.648051515Z","closed_at":"2026-02-05T02:54:45.648030355Z","close_reason":"Completed: explainability cockpit E2E step + snapshots + screen tests + gates","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1rz0.27","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:59.673851066Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3e1t.4.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:52:03.318964853Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.4","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:50:24.838825596Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
